name: Pratham Aggarwal
headline: Class XII student, Sat Paul Mittal School, Ludhiana, applying CS undergrad UK / US
lede: Builds CS-adjacent things for school audiences first, real numbers second. Two years running a Python tutoring track for Class 9 and 10, one summer porting a school timetable tool from Excel to a small React app three teachers actually use. Chasing CS programmes that take coursework and project work seriously alongside the marks.

education.label: Class XII (CBSE, predicted 2026)
education.body: Sat Paul Mittal School. Predicted 94% across PCM. Top three: Mathematics 99, Physics 96, Computer Science 95.

education.label: Class X (CBSE, 2024)
education.body: Sat Paul Mittal School. 462/500. Top three: Mathematics 99, Science 98, Social 96. School topper in Mathematics.

standardized_tests.label: IELTS Academic
standardized_tests.body: Band 7.5 overall. Listening 8.5, Reading 7.0, Writing 7.0, Speaking 7.5. Taken October 2025.

awards.label: School Mathematics topper, Class X
awards.body: Highest Mathematics score in a graduating cohort of 218.

publications.label: School newsletter — "Why we ditched the Excel timetable"
publications.body: Op-ed on the build process for the React timetable tool below. Distributed to ~600 students and parents.

internships.label: Sat Paul Mittal School — IT support intern
internships.body: Two-week stint helping the IT team migrate the staff timetable from a 12-tab Excel workbook to a React app. Wrote the conflict-detection logic.

volunteer.label: Local CBSE prep camp — volunteer tutor
volunteer.body: Eight Saturdays running Mathematics drill sessions for 14 Class IX students preparing for board exams.

activities.label: School CS Club, President
activities.body: 30+ active members. Built a Python tutoring track for Class 9 and 10 covering basics through small projects. Wrote the curriculum and ran weekly sessions.

activities.label: Inter-school Mathematics olympiad team, Captain
activities.body: Led a team of four to second place at the Punjab regional round. Designed the 6-week prep schedule.

activities.label: School newspaper, Tech section editor
activities.body: Edited the bi-monthly tech column. Commissioned and edited 11 student-written pieces over the year.

closing_note: Looking for a CS programme that gives students room to ship working things alongside the coursework. Comfortable working alone on a problem for weeks, more comfortable when there's a small team with a deadline.
